summary: Went to pick Kartik up from the airport a night perfect drive opportunity with Baliey (my persian cat).  Kartik bought us Basque cheescake from Mumbai, which was yum

memory_story.title: Baliey's Ride, Kartik's Return, Cheesecake Delight
memory_story.core_message: The simple joys of reunion, shared moments, and delicious treats make a perfect memory.

narrative.moment: The memory unfolds from a late-night drive to pick up Kartik from the airport, with Baliey, the Persian cat, as a calm companion on the dashboard. It culminates in a warm indoor gathering, celebrating Kartik's return and savoring the delicious Basque cheesecake he brought from Mumbai.
narrative.meaning: This memory highlights the beauty of anticipation, the comfort of companionship (both human and feline), and the delight of shared indulgence. It's a reminder that even simple occasions, like an airport pickup, can be filled with joy and connection.
narrative.reflection: A perfect blend of journey, reunion, and a truly delicious treat, making for an unforgettable night with loved ones.

characters.label: Baliey
characters.description: A fluffy Persian cat, calm and observant, resting on the car dashboard during a night drive. Its presence adds a unique companionship to the journey.

characters.label: Kartik
characters.description: The person being picked up from the airport, a bringer of delightful Basque cheesecake, adding to the joyous atmosphere of the reunion. His happy presence is inferred from the overall context and the group's smiles.

characters.label: Friends/Family members
characters.description: A group of happy individuals gathered indoors, smiling, making peace signs and thumbs-up gestures, clearly enjoying the reunion and the cheesecake. One individual with a beard shows an open, joyful laugh, others are smiling warmly.

photo_mapping.description: A cheerful indoor gathering of four friends/family members, two seated on a bed and two standing, all smiling broadly. One person on the bed makes a peace sign, another standing gives a thumbs-up. A box, likely containing the Basque cheesecake, is visible on the bed.
photo_mapping.visual_focus: The happy expressions of the four individuals and the group interaction.
photo_mapping.composition_hint: Mid-shot, group photo, candid, informal setting.

photo_mapping.description: Baliey, the fluffy Persian cat, is captured from behind, resting comfortably on a car dashboard at night. The car's navigation screen shows 'Head northeast' towards 'Terminal Blvd', illuminated by the glow of city lights outside.
photo_mapping.visual_focus: Baliey and the dashboard navigation display, showing the journey's context.
photo_mapping.composition_hint: Rear-view of cat on dashboard, emphasizing the night drive.

photo_mapping.description: Baliey, the Persian cat, is seen from a frontal angle, looking directly towards the viewer while perched on the car dashboard at night. The car's interior lights and the navigation screen showing 'Turn right' are visible, along with distant streetlights.
photo_mapping.visual_focus: Baliey's face and calm demeanor, along with the illuminated dashboard details.
photo_mapping.composition_hint: Close-up of cat on dashboard, highlighting its features and the environment.

visual_elements.color_mood: A blend of warm, inviting tones indoors (skin tones, cat fur, beddings) and cool, ambient blues and whites from night lights and car displays.

experience_flow.highlight_moment: The moment of laughter and shared delight while enjoying the Basque cheesecake together after Kartik's arrival.

text_elements.title_text: Baliey's Ride, Kartik's Return, Cheesecake Delight
text_elements.primary_caption: I go to pick up Kartik from the airport with my Persian
text_elements.secondary_caption: Treasured moments of connection, comfort, and culinary joy with my favorite companions.
text_elements.handwritten_note: So happy Kartik's back! Baliey was the best co-pilot, and that cheesecake? Absolutely divine!

style_adaptations.Junk Journal: Imagine a collaged spread with torn-edge photos of Baliey in the car taped onto a page. Alongside, handwritten scribbles recount the airport trip. A separate section would feature the group photo, with a 'yum!' speech bubble drawn next to the cheesecake box, accented with a small, hand-drawn cheesecake slice.
style_adaptations.Comic Strip: The story unfolds in a series of panels. Panel 1: A wide shot of the car interior at night, Baliey silhouetted on the dash, navigating. 'SFX: VROOM!' Panel 2: Close-up of Baliey's calm, slightly grumpy face. 'Baliey thought bubble: Are we there yet?' Panel 3: Four characters in a lively indoor setting, smiling broadly, one with a thumbs-up, another making a peace sign. Kartik points to the cheesecake. 'Caption: Welcome home, Kartik!' Panel 4: A focus on a slice of Basque cheesecake with steam lines 'SFX: YUM!' Bold outlines, speech bubbles, and vibrant colors would convey the energy and emotion.
style_adaptations.Rizograph: Rendered in limited, high-contrast colors (e.g., electric blue, fluorescent orange, black). The night drive scenes would use blues and blacks for the sky and car, with orange highlights for streetlights. The indoor reunion scene would feature orange for warm skin tones and the cheesecake, contrasted with blue outlines. Text would have a slight registration error effect, enhancing the graphic, print-like quality.
style_adaptations.Gongbi Polaroid: Delicate, precise brushstrokes would define Baliey's intricate fur and the subtle expressions on the faces of the people. Each scene would be framed within a soft-edged Polaroid, with gentle, layered washes of traditional Chinese colors—like muted greens for car interiors, soft blues for night, and warm sepia tones for skin and fur. A sense of timeless elegance would combine with the instant snapshot feel.

story.memory_summary: I went to pick up Kartik from the airport with my Persian cat Baliey, enjoying a perfect drive, and Kartik brought us a yummy Basque cheesecake from Mumbai. 🍰🚗

validation.summary: The generated comic strip flawlessly depicts the user's summary, encompassing the airport pick-up with Baliey and the enjoyment of Kartik's Basque cheesecake, all while adhering perfectly to the chosen Comic Strip style.
strengths: Excellent story alignment, covering all key aspects of the user summary.

Outstanding adherence to the Comic Strip style, including a clear multi-panel layout, proper speech bubble placement, correct speaker attribution (including off-panel user dialogue), and effective use of SFX.
High visual quality with clear, expressive illustrations that capture the emotional tone.
Successfully integrates elements from all reference photos into a cohesive narrative.

image_prompt:
A structured story-agent block (emotion, captions, visual cues, style-specific notes) is provided with the request; prefer it for mood, on-image text, and composition when present. Transform the provided input image into a high-impact comic-strip narrative in 9:16 format, preserving emotional truth and factual integrity. 🧩 INPUTS Image: User-provided photos (max 10) Context Text: User-provided story/caption User Emotion: joy | nostalgia | love | calm | sadness | chaos | excitement | mixed Emotion Intensity: low | medium | high 🎭 STYLE & VISUAL LANGUAGE Render in a comic / graphic novel style selected by emotion: Joy / Excitement → Clean modern comic (bold lines, vibrant flats, energetic framing) Nostalgia → Indie hand-drawn (paper grain, soft imperfections) Love → Soft modern comic (rounded lines, warm contrast) Calm → Minimal comic (clean lines, restrained details) Sadness → Muted indie style (soft lines, sparse composition) Chaos → Manga-inspired (dynamic angles, impact frames) ✏️ VISUAL EFFECTS (ENHANCED) Use strong ink outlines, layered halftone dots, rim lighting, dramatic shadow blocks, motion lines, speed streaks, impact bursts, depth blur, perspective distortion for action, and expressive on-scene sound words integrated naturally into the artwork. Scale effects by emotion intensity: low=subtle, medium=noticeable, high=cinematic. Keep faces recognizable and never distort identity. 🎨 COLOR & EMOTION SYSTEM (CRITICAL) Adapt the full palette and contrast to emotion: Joy/Excitement: bright saturated warm tones with lively highlights Nostalgia: warm faded tones and gentle contrast Love: harmonious warm palette with smooth transitions Calm: cool balanced tones with breathable contrast Sadness: desaturated blues/greys with soft shadows Chaos: high-contrast clashes with dramatic lighting 🎚️ Intensity controls saturation, contrast, shadow depth, and effects density. 🧠 NARRATIVE ADAPTATION Build 3-6 coherent panels with a clear emotional arc (setup → progression → peak → close). Every panel must include at least one narrative text element (speech bubble, callout box, or caption box). Maintain logical reading flow and visual continuity across panels. 💬 TEXT SYSTEM (STRICT) Use ONLY text grounded in provided summary/story-agent fields. 1) Speech bubbles: short dialogue lines near speaking characters; max 14 words each; legible comic font; high contrast; always draw a clear bubble tail that points to the correct speaker. If a line is spoken by the user, point the tail to the user character when visible; if the user is not visible in that panel, point the tail outward beyond the panel edge to indicate an off-panel speaker. 2) Callout boxes: rectangular annotation boxes for scene context, action beats, or memory notes; max 18 words each. 3) Caption boxes: brief narration for transitions; max 16 words. 4) Independent title box: include one distinct standalone title box (not inside speech/callout/caption), placed top or bottom, bold and clearly separated from panel content. Prefer story title_text or primary_caption; otherwise generate a concise 3-6 word title matching the scene. 🪶 Text clarity rules: no overlapping faces, avoid edge cutoffs, maintain padding, keep all text readable at mobile size. 🎯 COMPOSITION Focus on primary subjects, preserve likeness, simplify non-essential background details, and use panel borders/gutters for clarity. Emotion-based composition shift: Joy=open dynamic framing, Nostalgia=centered memory framing, Love=closer intimate framing, Calm=symmetrical balance, Sadness=more negative space, Chaos=tilted asymmetry. ⚠️ GUARDRAILS (STRICT) Do NOT fabricate events or characters beyond image/context. Do NOT add unrelated text. Do NOT over-dramatize subtle scenes. Avoid abbreviation labels for effects in on-image text; keep such text natural and in-world. Readability must win over effects. ✅ OUTPUT FORMAT High-resolution comic-strip image with integrated speech bubbles, callout boxes, caption boxes, and one independent title box; clean, shareable, social-ready.

## Story agent output (priority for mood, text, and composition)
Apply these fields when present: emotion and emotion_intensity for palette and energy; color_mood, key_objects, and environment for visuals; primary_caption, title_text, secondary_caption, and handwritten_note for any typography; characters and photo_mapping for who and what to emphasize; highlight_moment and pacing for narrative emphasis; the style-specific line for «Comic Strip» for how this style should treat the scene.
